title: Week 1 Recap — The Season Is Underway!
summary: The first week of the 2026 Men's Thursday Match Play League is in the books. Great conditions, competitive matches, and a few early surprises.
content:
What a way to kick off the 2026 season! Both flights saw tight matches across the board, with several going down to the final hole.

In the North Flight, Johnson & Smith came out strong with a decisive win over Williams & Brown, while the Taylor/Anderson vs. Thomas/Jackson matchup ended in a hard-fought tie — both teams leaving a point each on the board.

Down in the South Flight, Lewis & Lee set the early pace with a convincing opening-week victory, and the Green & Adams duo continued their hot play from last season to grab an early win.

Remember: the course is in excellent shape. Let's keep pace of play moving — ready golf when appropriate. See everyone next Thursday!
